Class AuthorDaoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.library.dao.impl.AuthorDaoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AuthorDao
public class AuthorDaoImpl extends Object implements AuthorDao
JDBC implementation of AuthorDao.

All queries are executed via PreparedStatement — no string concatenation is used anywhere in this class.

The search(String, String, Integer, Integer) method builds a dynamic WHERE clause at runtime from the provided filter arguments.

SQL state 23503 (foreign-key violation) from PostgreSQL is caught in delete(int) and re-thrown as a descriptive RuntimeException so the controller layer can display a user-friendly error dialog.

    • conn

      private Connection conn()

    • mapRow

      private Author mapRow(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Maps the current row of a ResultSet to an Author object.
      Parameters:
      rs - the result set positioned on the row to map
      Returns:
      a fully populated Author
      Throws:
      SQLException - if any column access fails

    • findAll

      public List<Author> findAll()
      Description copied from interface: AuthorDao
      Returns all authors ordered by full_name ascending.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface AuthorDao
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot; never null

    • findById

      public Optional<Author> findById(int id)
      Description copied from interface: AuthorDao
      Finds a single author by its primary key.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface AuthorDao
      Parameters:
      id - the author ID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the author, or empty if not found

    • findAllCountries

      public List<String> findAllCountries()
      Description copied from interface: AuthorDao
      Returns distinct country values present in the database, sorted alphabetically. Used to populate the country filter ComboBox.
      Specified by:
      findAllCountries in interface AuthorDao
      Returns:
      list of country strings; never null

    • search

      public List<Author> search(String text, String country, Integer yearFrom, Integer yearTo)
      Builds and executes a dynamic WHERE clause.

      The free-text term is matched case-insensitively against full_name, country, and the text representation of birth_year (so typing "1814" finds Shevchenko). Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.

      • text — case-insensitive LIKE match against full_name, country, and birth_year; ignored if blank
      • country — exact match against country; ignored if blank
      • yearFrom — birth_year >= yearFrom; ignored if null
      • yearTo — birth_year <= yearTo; ignored if null
      Specified by:
      search in interface AuthorDao
      Parameters:
      text - free-text search term; may be blank
      country - exact country filter; may be blank
      yearFrom - lower bound for birth year; may be null
      yearTo - upper bound for birth year; may be null
      Returns:
      matching authors ordered by full_name; never null

    • insert

      public void insert(Author a)
      Description copied from interface: AuthorDao
      Inserts a new author record. The id field of author is ignored; the generated key is assigned by the database.
      Specified by:
      insert in interface AuthorDao
      Parameters:
      a - the author to insert (fullName must be set)

    • update

      public void update(Author a)
      Description copied from interface: AuthorDao
      Updates an existing author record identified by author.getId().
      Specified by:
      update in interface AuthorDao
      Parameters:
      a - the author with updated fields; id must be valid

    • delete

      public void delete(int id)
      Deletes the author with the given id.

      If the author has books in the library, PostgreSQL raises SQL state 23503. This is caught and re-thrown as a RuntimeException with a human-readable message so the controller can show an error dialog instead of silently failing.

      Specified by:
      delete in interface AuthorDao
      Parameters:
      id - the primary key of the author to delete

    • query

      private List<Author> query(String sql, List<Object> args)
      Executes a parameterized SELECT and maps all rows to Author objects.
      Parameters:
      sql - the fully formed SQL query string
      args - ordered list of bind values (String or Integer)
      Returns:
      list of matched authors; never null

    • setNullableString

      private void setNullableString(PreparedStatement ps, int i, String v) throws SQLException
      Binds a String parameter or sets SQL NULL when blank.
      Parameters:
      ps - the prepared statement
      i - 1-based parameter index
      v - string value; null or blank → SQL NULL
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • setNullableInt

      private void setNullableInt(PreparedStatement ps, int i, int v) throws SQLException
      Binds an int parameter or sets SQL NULL when the value is 0 (sentinel for "not set", following the model convention).
      Parameters:
      ps - the prepared statement
      i - 1-based parameter index
      v - int value; 0 → SQL NULL
      Throws:
      SQLException
